title: LEGO Star Wars 75421 SMART Play: Darth Vader's TIE Fighter - All-in-One Interactive Toy Set incl. SMART Brick, Tag, Minifigure & Charger - Gift Idea for 8+ Year Old Boys, Girls & Adult Fans
features: INTERACTIVE STAR WARS BUILDING TOY – This LEGO SMART Play All-in-One set features one SMART Brick with its charger, one SMART Tag and one SMART Minifigure that power up immersive play, reacting to your every move

THE GALAXY PLAYS BACK – When connected to the TIE Fighter's SMART Tag, the SMART Brick responds to motion and colours with lights and sounds, activating laser-shooting, refuelling, and repair functions
LEGO SMART STAR WARS MINIFIGURE – Bring SMART Darth Vader to life with the SMART Brick for responsive play, triggering reactions to movements and situations he experiences

SCREEN-FREE PLAYTIME – Join friends and family to recreate epic movie scenes: help the Rebel Fleet Trooper defend the Rebel outpost equiped with a dual stud shooter and satelite for hours of role play
STAR WARS GIFT FOR KIDS – Treat a fan to this responsive building toy, which makes an out-of-this-world birthday gift idea for 8+ year old boys and girls, as well as teenage or adult collectors

LEGO SMART ASSIST APP – Get started, troubleshoot, control sound levels, download updates or activate a built-in microphone for potential future features (its activation will require both your permission and a firmware update)

SMART BRICK FEATURES – Offers 45 minutes of battery life per charge and is compatible with other SMART Play sets for expanded adventures (please note, the SMART Brick is not available to purchase as a stand-alone product)
description: From the manufacturer Interactive building toy The galaxy plays back Bring Darth Vader’s TIE Fighter missions to life with dynamic sounds and lights powered by the LEGO SMART Play system. This All-In-One Set offers kids hours of exciting, screen-free, solo or social play. Previous page Reacts to the way you move Kids experience realistic engine sounds and lights as they launch the TIE Fighter and swoosh it in different directions. Repair role play Use the hammer to trigger hammering noises. Refuelling sounds Move the fuel pump nozzle to the TIE Fighter’s tank and the SMART Tag triggers the sound of fuel being pumped. SMART Play battles Add the SMART Play: Luke’s Red Five X-Wing set (75423, sold separately) and relive classic Star Wars battles with dynamic sounds and lights. Next page Previous page SMART Brick The brains of the operation, responding to different movements, colours and more. SMART Brick charger The charger generates approx. 45 minutes of SMART Play action per charge. LEGO SMART Minifigure Bring SMART Darth Vader to life via the SMART Brick and hear his instant reactions to different situations. SMART Tag The SMART Tag triggers the SMART Brick, which responds to how kids move and play. Next page The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading.
